slides.name: The Great Deku Tree
slides.des: In the Kokiri Forest, Link is summoned by the Great Deku Tree. In order to prove his courage, Link must destroy the Great Deku Tree's curse...

slides.name: Becoming the Hero!
slides.des: Despite his lack of training, Link bravely ventures inside the Great Deku Tree and defeats his enemies!

slides.name: Saving the Deku Tree!
slides.des: Eventually, Link defeats the dungeon boss and obtains the first spiritual stone!

slides.name: Meeting Zelda
slides.des: After leaving the Kokiri Forest, Link meets Princess Zelda at Hyrule Castle. She commands Link to obtain the Master Sword and defeat Ganondorf.

slides.name: No Time Left!
slides.des: Upon returning to Hyrule Castle, Link meets Ganondorf, who is far too powerful for him right now...

slides.name: The Master Sword
slides.des: Link hurries to the Temple of Time and pulls the Master Sword, but unexpectedly enters a 7-year slumber!

slides.name: Reunion with Epona
slides.des: After waking up, Link is now an adult. Hyrule is no longer the same, but he still has Epona

slides.name: Meeting Sheik
slides.des: During his journey, Link meets Sheik, who assists him to defeat Ganondorf. Little does he know, that Sheik is actually Zelda in disguise...

slides.name: Freeing the Sages
slides.des: Slowly but surely, Link becomes stronger by defeating enemies and freeing the legendary sages!

slides.name: The Final Battle!
slides.des: After freeing all five sages, Link finally defeats Ganondorf in one final battle!

slides.name: Peace Restored
slides.des: After saving Hyrule, Link returns to the past and makes up for lost time
